h1: Custom Laptop Cases for Business & Travel
metaDescription: Order custom laptop cases for your team or event. Choose backpacks, sleeves, and briefs with your logo. Bulk pricing available at Perfect Imprints.
introHtml:
Whether you are equipping a remote sales team with durable laptop backpacks or assembling employee welcome kits with branded laptop sleeves, custom laptop cases make a practical and visible promotional item. They are a favorite among marketing directors for trade show giveaways, HR directors for onboarding packages, and safety managers for field crew gear.

Our selection includes eco-friendly options like the RPET Laptop Backpack and Renew rPET Laptop Sleeve, as well as professional styles such as the Specter Go Laptop Bag and Laptop Brief- Neoprene. From lightweight sleeves to padded backpacks that fit 17-inch devices, there is a case for every need.

All cases can be decorated with your logo using screen print, embroidery, or full-color print. Minimum order quantities vary by product, and we offer sample approval before full production. Bulk orders ship within 10-15 business days.

faqs.q: What are the minimum order quantities for custom laptop cases?
faqs.a: Minimums vary by product. Most backpacks start at 50-100 units, while sleeves may have lower minimums around 25-50. Contact us for specific product MOQs.

faqs.q: Which decoration methods are available for laptop cases?
faqs.a: We offer screen printing, embroidery, and full-color heat transfer. Backpacks often look best with embroidery on the front panel, while neoprene sleeves work well with screen printing.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide samples of blank or decorated cases. Sample fees apply but are typically credited back on the production order.

faqs.q: What are the typical production lead times?
faqs.a: Standard production takes 10-15 business days after artwork approval. Rush service may be available for an additional fee.

faqs.q: Do you offer eco-friendly laptop case options?
faqs.a: Yes, we carry several RPET and recycled material backpacks and sleeves, such as the RPET Laptop Backpack and Renew rPET Laptop Sleeve. These are popular for sustainability-focused initiatives.

heroAltText: Custom laptop cases including backpacks and sleeves with printed logos for corporate events and employee gifts.
